# Contributing to SaveCircle-Backend

Thank you for your interest in contributing to SaveCircle-Backend! We welcome contributions from the community.

## Getting Started

1. Fork the repository on GitHub
2. Clone your fork locally
3. Create a new branch for your feature or bug fix
4. Make your changes
5. Run tests and ensure everything works
6. Submit a pull request

## Development Setup

See the [README.md](README.md) for installation instructions.

## Code Style

- Follow Rust's standard formatting (use `cargo fmt`)
- Use `cargo clippy` for linting
- Write meaningful commit messages
- Add tests for new features

## Pull Request Process

1. Ensure your code compiles and tests pass
2. Update documentation if needed
3. Fill out the pull request template
4. Wait for review and address any feedback

## Reporting Issues

Use the issue templates provided in `.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/` to report bugs or request features.

## Code of Conduct

Please read and follow our [Code of Conduct](CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md).

## License

By contributing, you agree that your contributions will be licensed under the MIT License.
